history.text: Ottoman Empire ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The war of independence began, making sovereignty the central national struggle.
Government of the Grand National Assembly appears in Turkey's historical record.
The sultanate was abolished, clearing the way for a republican state.
Treaty of Lausanne set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
A republic was declared, changing Turkey's political system and state identity.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Turkey.

worthSeeing.title: Istanbul:
worthSeeing.text: Hagia Sophia, Grand Bazaar and the Bosphorus bridge two continents.

worthSeeing.title: Cappadocia:
worthSeeing.text: Fairy-chimney rock formations, underground cities and hot-air balloon flights at sunrise.

worthSeeing.title: Pamukkale:
worthSeeing.text: Cotton-white travertine terraces and ancient Roman spa city Hierapolis.
